1.name: B.Sc Computer Science
1.details:
💻 B.Sc COMPUTER SCIENCE

📖 About the Course:
Comprehensive program covering programming, software development, databases, networks, and emerging technologies.

🎯 Duration: 3 Years (6 Semesters)

📋 Eligibility:
- 12th Pass with Mathematics
- Minimum 50% marks

💼 Career Opportunities:
✅ Software Developer
✅ System Analyst
✅ Database Administrator
✅ Web Developer
✅ IT Consultant
✅ Cloud Engineer

TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture

💰 Starting Salary: 3-10 LPA

6.details:
